## Verification

- `npm test`

## Still Alpha

- Premiere editing depends on the trusted CEP panel.
- Full professional editing is not v1 complete.
- GPL adapters remain optional.
- Manual macOS/Windows verification is tracked in `docs/COMPATIBILITY_MATRIX.md`.
